speaker: speaker1
text: Food is less expensive in a cafeteria , because you serve yourself .

speaker: speaker1
text: Just pick up a tray , then put a knife , a fork , a spoon and a paper napkin on it and stand in the line .

speaker: speaker2
text: How long will it take to reach the buffet ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Not long , because people rush for lunch .

speaker: speaker2
text: The line sure does move fast .

speaker: speaker1
text: Tell the man behind the counter what you want .

speaker: speaker2
text: OK . I like that green vegetable but I don't know how to call it .

speaker: speaker1
text: Just point to it if you don't know the name .
